title: platanthera bifolia var. virens
intro: Platanthera bifolia var. virens, also known as the green orchid or pale green orchid, is a variety of the greater butterfly orchid, a type of flowering plant native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Platanthera bifolia var. virens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
